changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-config/src/provider.rs:40-110

Coverage: 77.2% (71/92 lines)

Uncovered lines: 43-45, 57, 59, 61, 67, 101-103, 108-109

```rust
fn validate_and_merge_yaml(&self, figment: Figment) -> ConfigurationResult<Figment>
fn load_into(&self, figment: Figment) -> ConfigurationResult<Figment> // unsupported ext branch
fn metadata(&self) -> Metadata
```

validate_and_merge_yaml reads YAML content, checks for null/empty files, and skips them gracefully. The load_into match has an unsupported extension error branch. Test: load a YAML file that parses to null (empty file), load a file with an unsupported extension (e.g. .ini), and verify the metadata() method returns expected name.
Add tests for FileProvider YAML null handling and unsupported extension
